title: Large Contraction in Coal India's Production
section_path: Large Contraction in Coal India's Production
section_path_text: Large Contraction in Coal India's Production
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, Coal India (which is responsible for over 75% of India's coal output) produced 56.1 million tons of coal last month. This is unchanged from April and is down year-on-year by 7.4 million tons (-12%). Coal India's production has now contracted on a year-on-year basis for three straight months.
